C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\iot-gateway.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\iot-gateway.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\iot-gateway.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\ucrt64\bin\c++.exe -mwindows -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\iot-gateway.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o iot-gateway.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libiot-gateway.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\iot-gateway.dir\linkLibs.rsp
